SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationTableCell
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationTableCell
public interface AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationTableCell, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess
Provides write access to a documentation table cell.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationTableCell. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on the read-only interface instead.

  • Method Details

    • addInlineElement

      void addInlineElement(AIiDocumentationInlineElement aInlineElement)
      Adds an inline element at the end of the cell.
      Parameters:
      aInlineElement - inline element to add

    • addInlineElements

      void addInlineElements(List<? extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement> aInlineElements)
      Adds multiple inline elements in the provided order.
      Parameters:
      aInlineElements - inline elements to add

    • addText

      void addText(String aElementId, String aText)
      Creates and adds a plain text inline element.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created text element
      aText - plain text content

    • addLineBreak

      void addLineBreak(String aElementId)
      Creates and adds an explicit line break.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created line break element

    • addLink

      void addLink(String aElementId, String aLabel, String aTarget, String aTitle)
      Creates and adds a non-semantic inline link.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created link element
      aLabel - human-readable link label
      aTarget - renderer-neutral link target
      aTitle - human-readable link title, or an empty string if unavailable

    • addReference

      void addReference(String aElementId, String aLabel, AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget aReferenceTarget, String aTitle)
      Creates and adds a semantic inline reference.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created reference element
      aLabel - human-readable reference label, or an empty string if it should be derived
      aReferenceTarget - structured semantic reference target
      aTitle - human-readable reference title, or an empty string if unavailable

    • addInlineCode

      void addInlineCode(String aElementId, String aCode)
      Creates and adds an inline code element.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable identifier of the created inline code element
      aCode - inline code text
